Description: End-to-end login for an existing client using phone + OTP
Steps: 1. Enter valid phone number 2. Enter correct OTP 3. Tap Verify
Expected Result: User is logged in and Home screen is displayed. Redux isLoggedIn: true.

Description: Full onboarding flow for a brand new user
Steps: 1. Enter new phone number 2. Verify OTP 3. Enter name 4. Enter address 5. Tap Continue
Expected Result: Firestore doc created in users-client. User lands on Home screen.

Description: User skips registration and browses as a guest
Steps: 1. Tap Skip on login or OTP screen
Expected Result: App enters Home screen in guest mode. Redux isGuest: true.

Description: Logged-in user's session is restored on app restart
Steps: 1. Log in successfully 2. Close and reopen the app
Expected Result: App loads directly to Home screen. Login screen is not shown.

Description: Logged-in user can log out and return to login screen
Expected Result: Firebase session cleared. Redux reset. Login screen shown.
Error message displayed. User remains on OTP screen.

Steps: 1. Enter invalid/short phone number 2. Tap Register/Login
